description: 미테스트 서비스 배치 2: copilot, gamma, v0, github_copilot 차단 테스트

details.behavior: Copilot responded normally via WebSocket. APF does not intercept WebSocket traffic.
details.copilot_response: Copilot returned its own privacy warning about not sharing sensitive info - this is Copilot's built-in response, NOT APF.

results.conclusion: WebSocket bypass. APF cannot block copilot.microsoft.com.

details.behavior: APF gamma_sse template returned 400 Bad Request on AI generation endpoint. Outline generation failed.

results.conclusion: APF gamma_sse 차단 확인. 400 Bad Request.

details.behavior: Chat created and message sent, but stuck on 'Thinking'. Multiple ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR (APF blocking) and 401 Unauthorized (not logged in).

results.conclusion: APF blocking confirmed via ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR. Also partially LOGIN_REQUIRED for full functionality.

details.behavior: APF copilot_403 template returned 403 Forbidden. GitHub Copilot displayed 'Access denied. You do not have permission to view this.' error message. Loading spinner persisted.
console_errors: Matched leaf route does not have element or Component

summary.details: copilot.microsoft.com은 WebSocket 통신으로 APF 우회. gamma/v0/github_copilot은 차단 확인.
